query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_lessons,
  SUM(CASE WHEN content IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(content) > 2000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as lessons_with_content,
  SUM(CASE WHEN scripture IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as lessons_with_scripture,
  AVG(LENGTH(content)) as avg_content_length
FROM lessons;
